## What are you adding / changing?

<!-- e.g. "Adds Tool X to the Studying category" -->

## Why does it help students learn?

<!-- One or two honest sentences. This is the bar for inclusion. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The link is official and currently working
- [ ] It helps students **learn** (not just "do my homework for me")
- [ ] I used the correct legend tags (🆓 🎓 🔒 ⭐)
- [ ] It's not already in the list
- [ ] No affiliate links
- [ ] Description is one clear, honest sentence
- [ ] (If applicable) I also added it to `docs/data.js` for the visual site
